revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十六]][[zh:六月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十六]][[zh:六月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十六]][[zh:六月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十六]][[zh:六月十六]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 16|qq=June 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}} , {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ) – The Meiji government issued a decree designating the 1st, 6th, and 16th of each month as {{ill|holidays|ja|休日|1=Non-working days|2=ja|3=休日|4=de|5=Ruhetag (Wirtschaft)|6=el|7=Αργία|8=hi|8=छुट्टी|9=ko|10=쉬는 날|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/holidays|13=User:Immanuelle/Non-working days|qq=}} .{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}}
== Births == * Year 15 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 21|en|July 21|qid=Q2727|lt=July 21|1=July 21}} , {{ill|1587|en|1587|qid=Q6744|lt=1587|1=1587}} ) – {{ill|Sakai Tadakatsu|en|Sakai Tadakatsu|qid=Q7402768|lt=Sakai Tadakatsu (Lord of Obama)|1=Sakai Tadakatsu}} , {{ill|Tairō|en|Tairō|qid=Q956844|lt=Tairō|1=Tairō}} and first lord of {{ill|Obama Domain|en|Obama Domain|qid=Q1088442|lt=Obama Domain (Wakasa Province)|1=Obama Domain}} (d. {{ill|1662|en|1662|qid=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}} ) * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 13|en|July 13|qid=Q2687|lt=July 13|1=July 13}} , {{ill|1832|en|1832|qid=Q7584|lt=1832|1=1832}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Ryōjun|en|Matsumoto Ryōjun|qid=Q3133066|lt=Matsumoto Ryōjun|1=Matsumoto Ryōjun}} , court physician and military doctor (d. {{ill|1907|en|1907|qid=Q2048|lt=1907|1=1907}} )
== Deaths == * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}} , {{ill|756|en|756|qid=Q31121|lt=756|1=756}} ) – {{ill|Yang Guifei|en|Yang Guifei|qid=Q298046|lt=Yang Guifei|1=Yang Guifei}} , beloved consort of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong of Tang|en|Emperor Xuanzong of Tang|qid=Q9746|lt=Emperor Xuanzong of Tang|1=Emperor Xuanzong of Tang}} (b. {{ill|719|en|719|qid=Q23537|lt=719|1=719}} )
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|qid=Q1373157|lt=Kashō (festival)|1=Kashō}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|15|6|17|5|16|7|6|0616|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
